headline: Elliott builds stake in Invisalign maker Align Technology, Bloomberg News reports
summary: March 18 (Reuters) - Elliott Investment Management has built a significant stake in Align Technology Inc, the maker of Invisalign teeth-straightening products, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday,

content.title: Elliott builds stake in Invisalign maker Align Technology, Bloomberg News reports
content.summary: March 18 (Reuters) - Elliott Investment Management has built a significant stake in Align Technology Inc, the maker of Invisalign teeth-straightening products, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday,

headline: Elliott Builds Stake in Invisalign-Maker Align Technology
summary: Elliott’s stake in Align makes it one of the dental device company’s largest investors, the people said.  A spokesperson for Elliott declined to comment.  Align’s stock has lost most of its value since 2021, when shares peaked at $729.92 amid a boom in spending on cosmetic procedures like teeth straightening as consumers spent more time seeing themselves on videoconferencing platforms such as Zoom during the pandemic.

content.title: Elliott Builds Stake in Invisalign-Maker Align Technology

headline: Alibaba stock falls despite AI outlook, Accenture lowers guidance
summary: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre and Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories. Alibaba (BABA) stock is plunging after the company reported revenue that fell short of expectations, though analysts are still bullish on Alibaba's artificial intelligence (AI) outlook. Accenture (ACN) lowered its full-year guidance. Elliott Investment Management is building a stake in Invisalign-maker Align Technology (ALGN).

content.title: Alibaba stock falls despite AI outlook, Accenture lowers guidance
content.description:
Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre and Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories.

Alibaba (BABA) stock is plunging after the company reported revenue that fell short of expectations, though analysts are still bullish on Alibaba's artificial intelligence (AI) outlook.

Accenture (ACN) lowered its full-year guidance.

Elliott Investment Management is building a stake in Invisalign-maker Align Technology (ALGN).
content.summary: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre and Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman take a closer look at some of Thursday morning's trending tickers and stories. Alibaba (BABA) stock is plunging after the company reported revenue that fell short of expectations, though analysts are still bullish on Alibaba's artificial intelligence (AI) outlook. Accenture (ACN) lowered its full-year guidance. Elliott Investment Management is building a stake in Invisalign-maker Align Technology (ALGN).
